title: Barebones Better Leaves
description: Creates holes on leaves in a style that fits the barebones resourcepack
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uMNp4n4WzFY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Owah! Leaves so rustly and simplistic!
 This texturepack simplifies the vanilla leaves texture while painting the invisible gaps for sunlight to beam through. Highly suggested to use with barebones texturepack. 

Leaves Changed:

Acacia

Azela (flowering & potted)

Birch

Spruce

Jungle

Mangrove (new!)

Oak

Dark Oak
